metadata.description: JSON-driven dose optimization rules for evening capsule assembly. The DoseOptimizer is the ONLY layer allowed to change upstream-selected doses. Each change is within KB min-max range and documented with explicit reasons.
changelog: v1: Ashwagandha + L-Theanine single-capsule fit rule

rules.description: Flex Ashwagandha to 450mg + L-Theanine at source dose into Evening Capsule 1 when Quercetin is absent, to eliminate Evening Capsule 2 and reduce total daily units.

metadata.note: Adjusted Ashwagandha within KB range (300-600mg) to create a single full evening capsule with L-Theanine, reducing total daily unit count.
